violations.text: Infant formula was observed to be expired (Use by date: 2024). Person in charge removed formula from shelving and set aside for credit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3-door refrigerator has an accumulation of milk residue on the shelving/doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
